title: cybele milnei
intro: Cybele milnei, also known as the Milne's Cybele, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family, specifically the genus Cybele. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, making it a potential treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Cybele milnei include its ability to soothe respiratory tract irritations, ease coughs, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Traditionally, Cybele milnei is prepared as a tea or tincture, with the roots being used in herbal preparations to extract its medicinal properties.
